title: Super Chicken
description: Let the chicken lay eggs endlessly
body:
# Funny Chicken Mod - Make your chicken lay eggs like crazy!

🕹️ **For Minecraft 1.16.5 Forge**

## 🌟 Mod Features
- 🪄 Get the magical **Surprise Stick** to control your chicken's egg-laying behavior!
- 🎨 Purple italicized names + enchanted light effects + rarity borders
- 🥚 Left click puts the chicken into **Infinite Egg Laying Mode**
- 🛑 Right click to unlock the chicken's crazy state
- 🔊 Laying eggs is accompanied by sound effects and heart particles.

## 🔧 Getting Tools
/funny chicken
